reasoning_content:
I've updated the parser grammar to include:
1. Parenthesized expressions
2. Function calls and array indexing in postfix expressions
3. Logical NOT operator
4. Multiplicative expressions (multiply, divide, modulo)
5. Relational expressions (less, greater, less equal, greater equal)
6. Equality expressions (equal equal, not equal)
7. Logical AND and OR expressions
8. All assignment operators
9. Void and Const type specifiers
10. Function parameters
11. If/Else statements
12. While loops
13. Break and Continue statements

Now let me rebuild and test.
